description: Full screen dark title card that fades in, used as a transition between documentary segments

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Large title shown center screen, e.g. 'THE BREACH'
fields.CHAPTER_WORD: Small label above title, e.g. 'PART ONE'
fields.CHAPTER_SUB: Subtitle below title, e.g. 'How it all began'
fields.TAG_1: Small tag below subtitle, e.g. 'ARXXIS ORIGINALS'
